name_en: ❤️ B-style exquisite 'Title - Taylor Handbag', crafted with vintage plaid fabric and finished with smooth leather trim and exquisite three-button rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. Dimensions: 26 x 13.5 x 20cm
